basic_details.job_title: Indian Army 95th SSC RVC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.post_name: Short Service Commission (SSC) Officers in Remount Veterinary Corps (Men & Women)
basic_details.short_information: The latest Indian Army Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Short Service Commission (SSC) Officers in Remount Veterinary Corps (RVC) - Men & Women posts! Published in April 2026 on the official website joinindianarmy.nic.in, this recruitment drive offers 20 vacancies (18 for Men & 2 for Women). Applicants within the age limit of 21 to 32 years and possessing a BVSc / BVSc & AH degree can apply online from 15/17 April 2026 (1500 hrs) to 15/18 May 2026 (1500 hrs). Find all details about the Indian Army SSC RVC new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, online application form, and notification

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the notifications.

age_limit.details: Age Limit: 21-32 years as on the last date of submission of application.

qualification.details: Nationality: Candidate must be a citizen of India / subject of Nepal / person of Indian origin who migrated from specified countries with intention of permanently settling in India (certificate of eligibility required where applicable; not needed for Gorkha subjects of Nepal). | Educational Qualification (Common for Men & Women) BVSc / BVSc & AH degree from any recognized Indian university or equivalent foreign degree (must be included in the first or second schedule of the Indian Veterinary Council Act, 1984). Internship must be completed at the time of application. | Note: Candidates not in possession of all marksheets and internship completion certificate need not apply.

salary_details.details: Officers are commissioned in the rank of Captain. | Additional Benefits: Concessional accommodation, free ration (self), free medical facilities for self & family, LTC, 60 days annual leave, 20 days casual leave, canteen facilities, group insurance.

selection_process: Initial screening of applications SSB Interview Medical Examination Preparation of merit list (based on SSB marks only)
how_to_apply: Click on ‘Officers Entry Apply/Login’ and then click ‘Registration’ (skip if already registered).
Fill the online registration form after reading the instructions carefully.
After registration, click on ‘Apply Online’ under Dashboard.
Select ‘Short Service Commission RVC (Men)’ or ‘Short Service Commission RVC (Women)’ as applicable.
Fill details under various segments - Personal information, Communication details, Education details and details of previous SSB.
Save & Continue each time before moving to the next segment.
Review the Summary page and click ‘Submit’.
Candidates must click ‘Submit’ each time they open the application for editing.
Take out two printed copies of the application having Roll Number, 30 minutes after final submission on the last day.
important_instructions: Read the detailed advertisement carefully before filling the online application. Candidates must ascertain their eligibility before applying. No changes to details are allowed after final submission. Carry all original documents + self-attested copies to SSB. Matriculation certificate is the only accepted proof of DOB, name & parents’ name. Serving candidates must apply through proper channel and obtain NOC. Any false information will lead to cancellation of candidature at any stage. Candidates (unmarried/widow/divorcee) will not be allowed to marry during training. Registration with Veterinary Council of India / State Veterinary Council is mandatory before training commencement.

faq.question: Q1. What is Indian Army 95th SSC RVC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The Indian Army 95th SSC RVC Recruitment 2026 is a notification released to recruit eligible candidates for the Short Service Commission in the Remount Veterinary Corps. This recruitment is specifically for veterinary graduates who wish to serve in the Indian Army. It offers a prestigious opportunity to work in animal care and military service.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for Indian Army SSC RVC 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for Indian Army SSC RVC 2026 must possess a recognized Veterinary Graduate degree. This ensures that applicants have the required knowledge and skills in animal healthcare. Only candidates meeting the educational qualifications can proceed with the application process.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for Indian Army Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age required is 21 years, while the maximum age limit is 32 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules for reserved categories. Candidates should carefully verify their eligibility before applying online.

faq.question: Q4. What are the important dates for Indian Army SSC RVC 2026?
faq.answer: For women candidates, the application starts on 15 April 2026 and ends on 15 May 2026. For men candidates, the application begins on 17 April 2026 and closes on 18 May 2026. Applicants must submit their forms within these deadlines to avoid rejection.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for Indian Army Recruitment 2026 online?
faq.answer: Candidates need to visit the official website joinindianarmy.nic.in to apply online. After registration, fill in the required details, upload documents, and submit the form. It is important to double-check all information before final submission.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for Indian Army SSC RVC 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee details for Indian Army SSC RVC 2026 have not been announced yet. Candidates are advised to regularly check the official notification for updates. Usually, the fee structure varies based on category.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available in Indian Army SSC RVC 2026?
faq.answer: The total number of vacancies for Indian Army SSC RVC 2026 has not been specified in the notification. However, separate entries are available for both men and women candidates. Applicants should refer to the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the Indian Army SSC RVC 2026 notification PDF?
faq.answer: Candidates can download the official notification PDF from the Indian Army website joinindianarmy.nic.in. The notification contains complete details about eligibility, dates, and application process. It is important to read it carefully before applying.
